dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkCoordinateSearch

  • java.lang.Object

extends java.lang.Object

      static java.lang.String LUCENE_API_STANDARD_PATH
      Nexus repositories generally provide a rest API for querying in lucene style.

    • Field Detail

      • LUCENE_API_STANDARD_PATH

        public static final java.lang.String LUCENE_API_STANDARD_PATH
        Nexus repositories generally provide a rest API for querying in lucene style. This is the path where this api is exposed by default.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkCoordinateSearch of()

      • of

        public static JkCoordinateSearch of(JkRepo repo)

      • setApiUrl

        public JkCoordinateSearch setApiUrl(java.lang.String url)

      • setTimeout

        public JkCoordinateSearch setTimeout(int timeout)
        Sets the timeout for the search operation.
        Parameters:
        timeout - the timeout duration in milliseconds

      • setGroupOrNameCriteria

        public JkCoordinateSearch setGroupOrNameCriteria(java.lang.String groupOrNameCriteria)
        Sets the group or name criteria for the search.
        Parameters:
        groupOrNameCriteria - the group or name pattern to be used as a search criterion. Example: 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-dependencies::'
        Returns:
        the current instance of JkCoordinateSearch for method chaining

      • search

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> search()
